title: The Road to Alabasta Begins — Part 6
description: On pages 24–24, this part focuses on the road to alabasta begins — part 6, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: The Road to Alabasta Begins — Part 6. After leaving Drum, the crew heads deeper into Alabasta’s conflict while the desert kingdom’s danger comes into view. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 2 Bon Clay
dialogue.text: Mr. 2 Bon Kurei, you seem to be in an awfully good mood.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 2 Bon Clay
dialogue.text: Gahahaha! I planted myself a small seed of friendship, that's why!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Don't you realize how serious this is, Luffy?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Hold on just a see. Even though our captain probably doesn't have any real reason for thinking this way, I don't think he's wrong either. There's no reason to panic already.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: We should consider ourselves lucky for having met him just now.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Because now, we can set up a counter- measure.

summary: This part highlights the road to alabasta begins — part 6 and moves the chapter forward through its central emotional or plot turn.
